name: Aaron Naber
description:
Left with images of you pouring from my eyes:

You young, you here, day dawning, eyes wide...

—

In a room that holds you

Like a guilt-ridden paralyzing cell:

No calls.

No mail.

No visitors for when you're in hell...

Your new foster brother seems okay. Quiet, relatively well behaved, only slightly smelly. The dog tags are questionable. So is the military gear. And how often he spends around that weird blond twink who keeps calling you 'civvy' is... Odd, at best. Irritating at worst.

—

Unfortunately for you, normalcy won't be on the menu for all too long. Especially not when you feel rough hands slipping up your thighs while you're tucked away in bed. . .
